dir.name: cookie
dir.response:
if exists(select 1 from hrdtkh where ma_khoa = @ma_khoa) begin select rtrim(a.ma_mh) as ma_mh, b.ten_mh%l, a.ma_dvdt, c.ten_dvdt%l, a.loai_hinh_dt, d.ten_loai%l, a.ngay_hoc1, a.ngay_hoc2, a.stt_rec, a.ngay_ct from hrdtkh a with(nolock) left join hrdmmh b with(nolock) on a.ma_mh = b.ma_mh left join hrdmdvdt c with(nolock) on a.ma_dvdt = c.ma_dvdt left join hrdmlhdt d with(nolock) on a.loai_hinh_dt = d.ma_loai where ma_khoa = @ma_khoa return end
&ListTicket;
